title: Enneads I.1: What Is the Living Being?
description: What constitutes a living being? Not the body alone, nor the soul alone, but their union — yet the true self is the soul.
introduction: What constitutes a living being? Not the body alone, nor the soul alone, but their union — yet the true self is the soul.

translation.text: What is this thing that we call the living being? Is it the soul? Is it the body? Or is it the compound of both?
